---
title: "Teaching"
---

<!-- Keep this list aligned with current modules and teaching responsibilities. -->

My teaching interests are centred on quantitative ecology, demographic methods, and clear scientific communication.

Likely teaching areas include:

- Population Biology and Evolution
- Introduction to Biodemography
- Quantitative Conservation Ecology
- Data Handling, Visualisation and Statistics

I support open teaching materials where appropriate, particularly for quantitative ecology and R-based analysis.

## Course resources

- Population Biology and Evolution book: [BB512 Book](https://jonesor.github.io/BB512_Book/)
- Data Handling, Visualisation and Statistics book: [BB852 Book](https://jonesor.github.io/BB852_Book/)
- Population Biology and Evolution apps: [BB512 Shiny suite](https://jonesor.shinyapps.io/bb512suite/)
- Data Handling, Visualisation and Statistics apps: [BB852 Shiny suite](https://jonesor.shinyapps.io/bb852suite/)
